projects.name: NotASithLord/peerd
projects.description: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in your browser — drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.
projects.full_description: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in your browser — drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.
